title: L5: Selection Part 2
description: Writing full if statements and if/else blocks with correct conditions, colons, and indentation.

steps.title: Do Now Activity
steps.content:
Do Now Activity

5 minutes - from last lesson

Answer these quick questions from the selection lesson before continuing.

steps.title: Full If Statements
steps.content:
Full If Statements

In this lesson, you will write the whole selection block: the if line and the indented code that runs when the condition is True.

coins = 5
if coins >= 5:
    print("You have enough!")

Click run to see what happens

steps.title: Level 25 - Choose Full If Statements
steps.content:
Level 25 - Choose Full If Statements

Choose the correct full if block.

Choose the correct full if block:
steps.js: (function(){ var questions = [{"html":"Which correctly prints a message if coins is greater than or equal to 5?","correctCode":"if coins >= 5: print('You have enough!')","optionsRaw":["if coins >= 5: print('You have enough!')","if coins > 5: print('You have enough!')","if coins <= 5: print('You have enough!')","if coins == 5: print('You have enough!')"]},{"html":"Which correctly prints a message if health is less than 10?","correctCode":"if health < 10: print('Low health!')","optionsRaw":["if health < 10: print('Low health!')","if health <= 10: print('Low health!')","if health > 10: print('Low health!')","if health != 10: print('Low health!')"]},{"html":"Which correctly prints a message if score is exactly 100?","correctCode":"if score == 100: print('Perfect!')","optionsRaw":["if score == 100: print('Perfect!')","if score = 100: print('Perfect!')","if score != 100: print('Perfect!')","if score >= 100: print('Perfect!')"]},{"html":"Which correctly prints a message if level is greater than 3?","correctCode":"if level > 3: print('Advanced!')","optionsRaw":["if level > 3: print('Advanced!')","if level >= 3: print('Advanced!')","if level < 3: print('Advanced!')","if level == 3: print('Advanced!')"]},{"html":"Which correctly prints a message if lives is not equal to 0?","correctCode":"if lives != 0: print('Still alive!')","optionsRaw":["if lives != 0: print('Still alive!')","if lives == 0: print('Still alive!')","if lives > 0: print('Still alive!')","if lives < 0: print('Still alive!')"]},{"html":"Which correctly prints a message if age is less than or equal to 12?","correctCode":"if age <= 12: print('Child ticket')","optionsRaw":["if age <= 12: print('Child ticket')","if age < 12: print('Child ticket')","if age >= 12: print('Child ticket')","if age == 12: print('Child ticket')"]},{"html":"Which correctly prints a message if temperature is greater than 30?","correctCode":"if temperature > 30: print('Too hot!')","optionsRaw":["if temperature > 30: print('Too hot!')","if temperature >= 30: print('Too hot!')","if temperature < 30: print('Too hot!')","if temperature != 30: print('Too hot!')"]},{"html":"Which correctly prints a message if speed is greater than or equal to 100?","correctCode":"if speed >= 100: print('Too fast!')","optionsRaw":["if speed >= 100: print('Too fast!')","if speed > 100: print('Too fast!')","if speed <= 100: print('Too fast!')","if speed == 100: print('Too fast!')"]},{"html":"Which correctly prints a message if attempts is equal to 3?","correctCode":"if attempts == 3: print('No more tries!')","optionsRaw":["if attempts == 3: print('No more tries!')","if attempts = 3: print('No more tries!')","if attempts != 3: print('No more tries!')","if attempts > 3: print('No more tries!')"]},{"html":"Which correctly prints a message if battery is less than or equal to 20?","correctCode":"if battery <= 20: print('Low battery!')","optionsRaw":["if battery <= 20: print('Low battery!')","if battery < 20: print('Low battery!')","if battery >= 20: print('Low battery!')","if battery == 20: print('Low battery!')"]},{"html":"Which correctly prints a message if errors is not equal to 0?","correctCode":"if errors != 0: print('Fix your code!')","optionsRaw":["if errors != 0: print('Fix your code!')","if errors == 0: print('Fix your code!')","if errors > 0: print('Fix your code!')","if errors <= 0: print('Fix your code!')"]},{"html":"Which correctly prints a message if grade is greater than or equal to 50?","correctCode":"if grade >= 50: print('You passed!')","optionsRaw":["if grade >= 50: print('You passed!')","if grade > 50: print('You passed!')","if grade <= 50: print('You passed!')","if grade == 50: print('You passed!')"]},{"html":"Which correctly prints a message if fuel is less than 5?","correctCode":"if fuel < 5: print('Low fuel!')","optionsRaw":["if fuel < 5: print('Low fuel!')","if fuel <= 5: print('Low fuel!')","if fuel > 5: print('Low fuel!')","if fuel != 5: print('Low fuel!')"]},{"html":"Which correctly prints a message if rank is equal to 1?","correctCode":"if rank == 1: print('First place!')","optionsRaw":["if rank == 1: print('First place!')","if rank = 1: print('First place!')","if rank != 1: print('First place!')","if rank >= 1: print('First place!')"]},{"html":"Which correctly prints a message if stock is less than or equal to 0?","correctCode":"if stock <= 0: print('Out of stock!')","optionsRaw":["if stock <= 0: print('Out of stock!')","if stock < 0: print('Out of stock!')","if stock >= 0: print('Out of stock!')","if stock == 0: print('Out of stock!')"]}]; var idx=0, score=0; var prog=document.getElementById('level25-prog'), scoreEl=document.getElementById('level25-score'), qEl=document.getElementById('level25-q'), optsEl=document.getElementById('level25-opts'), fb=document.getElementById('level25-fb'), exp=document.getElementById('level25-exp'); function shuffle(a){ return a.slice().sort(function(){return Math.random()-0.5;}); } function render(){ if(idx>=questions.length){ finish(); return; } var q=questions[idx]; prog.textContent='Question '+(idx+1)+' of '+questions.length; scoreEl.textContent='Score: '+score; qEl.innerHTML=q.html || q.prompt || ''; optsEl.innerHTML=''; fb.textContent=''; fb.className='ex-feedback'; exp.style.display='none'; exp.textContent=''; shuffle(q.optionsRaw || q.options || []).forEach(function(opt){ var btn=document.createElement('button'); btn.className='ex-opt'; btn.textContent=opt; btn.onclick=function(){ optsEl.querySelectorAll('.ex-opt').forEach(function(b){ b.disabled=true; if(b.textContent===(q.correctCode || q.correct)) b.classList.add('correct'); }); exp.textContent=q.notice || q.explanation || ''; exp.style.display=exp.textContent ? 'block' : 'none'; if(opt===(q.correctCode || q.correct)){ btn.classList.add('correct'); score++; scoreEl.textContent='Score: '+score; fb.className='ex-feedback ok'; fb.textContent='Correct.'; setTimeout(function(){ idx++; render(); }, 1000); } else { btn.classList.add('wrong'); fb.className='ex-feedback err'; fb.textContent='Incorrect. The answer is shown in green.'; setTimeout(function(){ idx++; render(); }, 2200); } }; optsEl.appendChild(btn); }); } function finish(){ prog.textContent='Complete'; qEl.innerHTML=''; optsEl.innerHTML=''; exp.style.display='none'; var pass=score>=Math.ceil(questions.length*0.7); fb.className='ex-feedback '+(pass?'ok':'hint'); fb.textContent='You scored '+score+' out of '+questions.length+'. '+(pass?'Well done.':'Review the examples, then try similar questions again.'); window.__markStepComplete && window.__markStepComplete(); } render(); })();

steps.title: Writing If Blocks
steps.content:
Writing If Blocks

The print line belongs inside the if statement, so it must be indented.

if health < 10:
    print("Low health!")

Click run to see what happens

steps.title: Level 26 - Write Full If Statements
steps.content:
Level 26 - Write Full If Statements

Write the full if block.

Write the full if block:

steps.title: If Else Blocks
steps.content:
If Else Blocks

else gives Python something to do when the if condition is False.

grade = 45
if grade >= 50:
    print("Passed!")
else:
    print("Failed!")

Click run to see what happens

steps.title: Level 27 - Choose If Else Blocks
steps.content:
Level 27 - Choose If Else Blocks

Choose the correct if/else block.

Choose the correct if/else block:

steps.title: Writing If Else Blocks
steps.content:
Writing If Else Blocks

Both branches need indented code. else is lowercase and has a colon.

if lives != 0:
    print("Still alive!")
else:
    print("Game over!")

Click run to see what happens

steps.title: Level 28 - Write If Else Blocks
steps.content:
Level 28 - Write If Else Blocks

Write the full if/else block.

Write the full if/else block:

steps.title: Stage 5 Ready
steps.content:
Ready for Stage 5

You have now practised every skill that appears in the Stage 5 exam.

Full if block

if coins >= 5:
    print("Enough")

Indented body

4 spaces before code inside the block

else branch

else:
    print("Not enough")

Two outcomes

if score >= 50:
    print("Pass")
else:
    print("Fail")

Click run to see what happens

steps.title: Exam 5: Selection Part 2
steps.content:
Exam 5: Selection Part 2

Work through all questions. This checks full if statements and if/else blocks.

steps.title: Endless Practice
steps.content:
Endless Practice

Random questions from across Selection Part 2. Answer 5 questions correctly in a row to complete this step.

Streak: 0 Best: 0
steps.js:
(function(){ var mcqPool=[{"prompt":"Choose the correct code:","html":"Which correctly prints a message if coins is greater than or equal to 5?","correct":"if coins >= 5: print('You have enough!')","options":["if coins >= 5: print('You have enough!')","if coins > 5: print('You have enough!')","if coins <= 5: print('You have enough!')","if coins == 5: print('You have enough!')"]},{"prompt":"Choose the correct code:","html":"Which correctly prints a message if lives is not equal to 0?","correct":"if lives != 0: print('Still alive!')","options":["if lives != 0: print('Still alive!')","if lives == 0: print('Still alive!')","if lives > 0: print('Still alive!')","if lives < 0: print('Still alive!')"]},{"prompt":"Choose the correct code:","html":"Which correctly prints a message if coins is greater than or equal to 5, otherwise prints a different message?","correct":"if coins >= 5: print('Enough!') else: print('Not enough!')","options":["if coins >= 5: print('Enough!') else: print('Not enough!')","if coins >= 5: print('Enough!') else print('Not enough!')","if coins >= 5: print('Enough!') Else: print('Not enough!')","if coins >= 5: print('Enough!') else: print('Not enough!')"]},{"prompt":"Choose the correct code:","html":"Which correctly prints a message if lives is not equal to 0, otherwise prints a different message?","correct":"if lives != 0: print('Alive!') else: print('Game over!')","options":["if lives != 0: print('Alive!') else: print('Game over!')","if lives == 0: print('Alive!') else: print('Game over!')","if lives != 0: print('Alive!') else: print('Game over!')","if lives != 0: print('Alive!') else: print('Game over!')"]}], textPool=[{"label":"Write the code:","html":"Print 'You have enough!' if coins is greater than or equal to 5.","pattern":"if\s+coins\s*>=\s*5\s*:\n\s+print\s*\(\s*["'][^"']+["']\s*\)","hint":"if coins >= 5: print('You have enough!')","rows":3},{"label":"Write the code:","html":"If coins is greater than or equal to 5, print 'You have enough!', otherwise print 'Not enough coins.'","pattern":"if\s+coins\s*>=\s*5\s*:\n\s+print\s*\(\s*["'][^"']+["']\s*\)\nelse\s*:\n\s+print\s*\(\s*["'][^"']+["']\s*\)","hint":"if coins >= 5: print('You have enough!') else: print('Not enough coins.')","rows":6},{"label":"Write the code:","html":"If lives is not equal to 0, print 'Still alive!', otherwise print 'Game over.'","pattern":"if\s+lives\s*!=\s*0\s*:\n\s+print\s*\(\s*["'][^"']+["']\s*\)\nelse\s*:\n\s+print\s*\(\s*["'][^"']+["']\s*\)","hint":"if lives != 0: print('Still alive!') else: print('Game over.')","rows":6}]; var streak=0,best=parseInt(localStorage.getItem('pylearn_selection2_best')||'0',10); document.getElementById('sel2-ep-best').textContent=best; function rand(a){return a[Math.floor(Math.random()*a.length)];} function correct(){streak++; if(streak>best){best=streak; localStorage.setItem('pylearn_selection2_best',best); document.getElementById('sel2-ep-best').textContent=best;} document.getElementById('sel2-ep-streak').textContent=streak; if(streak>=5)window.__markStepComplete&&window.__markStepComplete();} function wrong(){streak=0; document.getElementById('sel2-ep-streak').textContent=streak;} function next(){Math.random()<0.5?showMcq(rand(mcqPool)):showText(rand(textPool));} function showMcq(q){var wrap=document.getElementById('sel2-ep-q'); wrap.innerHTML='
'+q.prompt+'
'+q.html+'
'; q.options.slice().sort(function(){return Math.random()-0.5;}).forEach(function(o){var btn=document.createElement('button'); btn.className='ex-opt'; btn.textContent=o; btn.onclick=function(){document.querySelectorAll('#sel2-ep-opts .ex-opt').forEach(function(b){b.disabled=true;if(b.textContent===q.correct)b.classList.add('correct');}); var fb=document.getElementById('sel2-ep-fb'); if(o===q.correct){btn.classList.add('correct');correct();fb.className='ex-feedback ok';fb.textContent='Correct.';setTimeout(next,1000);}else{btn.classList.add('wrong');wrong();fb.className='ex-feedback err';fb.textContent='Incorrect. The answer is shown in green.';}}; document.getElementById('sel2-ep-opts').appendChild(btn);});} function showText(q){var wrap=document.getElementById('sel2-ep-q'); wrap.innerHTML='
'+q.label+'
'+q.html+'
'; document.getElementById('sel2-ep-check').onclick=function(){var input=document.getElementById('sel2-ep-answer'), val=input.value.trim(), fb=document.getElementById('sel2-ep-fb'), hint=document.getElementById('sel2-ep-hint'); if(!val){fb.className='ex-feedback hint';fb.textContent='Type your answer first.';hint.textContent=q.hint;hint.style.display='block';return;} if(new RegExp(q.pattern,'i').test(val)){input.classList.add('correct');correct();fb.className='ex-feedback ok';fb.textContent='Correct.';setTimeout(next,1000);}else{input.classList.add('wrong');wrong();fb.className='ex-feedback err';fb.textContent='Not quite. Check indentation and colons.';hint.textContent=q.hint;hint.style.display='block';}}; document.getElementById('sel2-ep-answer').focus();} next(); })();

quizQuestions.q: Which block prints a message only when coins is at least 5?
Which if/else block has the correct structure?
Which keyword gives an alternative path when an if condition is False?
Which block checks that role is exactly the text admin?
Which comparison includes the boundary value 100?
Which mistake would cause a syntax error?
Store a score below 50. Write an if/else block that prints Pass for passing scores and Try again otherwise.
Store lives as zero. Write an if/else block that prints Alive when lives is not zero and Game over otherwise.
Write a full if/else block that checks whether grade is at least 50 and prints one message in each branch.
Store game_over as False. Write an if/else block using not so the output is Continue.
Write a full if block that checks whether role is exactly the text admin and prints a message inside the block.
